code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let first = byte_or_zero(s, i)
      if first == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if first == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let c = byte_or_zero(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut m = 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      m = v
    when None
      m = 0
    end
    out = list.push(out, m)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if v != m
          new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  out
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
  mut all = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)
  mut i = 0
  while i < b.len()
    match b.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      all = list.push(all, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let sorted = sort_unique(all)
  mut line = ""
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        line = "#{v}"
      else
        line = "#{line} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(line)
end
